title: Update AI bot prompts for deterministic memory search mode selection
requirements: Prompt must map exact source file/content requests to source_explicit + source_content.
Prompt must map semantic source file/document requests to source_explicit + source_semantic.
Prompt must map meaning-based accepted knowledge requests to knowledge_semantic + semantic_heavy.
Prompt must map exact ids/codes/names/dates to knowledge_precise + precise.
Prompt must map knowledge-first with source fallback to source_fallback + balanced.
Prompt must instruct the bot not to pass raw weights and not to present source_data as accepted knowledge.
Prompt must mention that source semantic search is available only through existing memory.search, not a separate API.
